templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}():
    """Return platform info dict."""
    import platform, sys
    return {
        'system': platform.system(),
        'release': platform.release(),
        'machine': platform.machine(),
        'python': platform.python_version(),
        'hostname': platform.node(),
        'executable': sys.executable,
    }
